metrics.top_terms: conf, uncertainty, quantum, that, this, mechanics, collapse, evidence, observer, eden, mechanism, authority, five, independent, physical

sections.title: Clarity
sections.text:
20
Bias risk (lower better)
60
Limitations are briefly addressed in the 'System Audit' section, identifying overreach and unproven claims.

sections.title: Universal Paper Model
sections.text:
### problem
Standard quantum mechanics lacks a mechanism that assigns different collapse authority to different observers.
conf 0.90
> Standard quantum mechanics has no mechanism for this. There is no hierarchy of observer authority in any textbook.
Uncertainty: The statement is an author assertion rather than experimental data.
The identity of the observer authorized to make reality real is unresolved in quantum mechanics.
conf 0.80
> The question Genesis asks is the question quantum mechanics cannot answer: Who is authorized to make reality real?
Uncertainty: Conceptual problem framed philosophically rather than empirically.

sections.title: method
sections.text:
The authors map five defining properties of quantum superposition onto the Eden narrative.
conf 0.70
> Five properties. Five complete matches.
Uncertainty: Details of the mapping are qualitative and interpretive.
The study uses cross-domain confirmation through phase transitions as an independent physical system.
conf 0.75
> Third: a cross-domain confirmation through an independent physical system (phase transitions) that exhibits the same five properties through an entirely different mechanism.
Uncertainty: The supplemental evidence is referenced but not presented in the excerpt.

sections.title: variables
sections.text:
Informational Fidelity is introduced as a variable measuring how cleanly an observer received the system's boundary conditions.
conf 0.90
> The framework calls this variable Informational Fidelity — how cleanly an observer received the system's boundary conditions from the Source.
Uncertainty: Definition exists but quantification is missing.

sections.title: mechanism
sections.text:
The Tree of Knowledge functions as a measurement operator that collapses the superposition and activates entropy.
conf 0.90
> The Tree of Knowledge is the measurement operator. Touch it and the question gets forced. The arrow of time activates. Death becomes possible because decay becomes possible because entropy has entered the equation.
Uncertainty: Mechanistic description is metaphorical and not experimentally verified.
Adam's interaction crossed both physical and authority thresholds causing collapse that propagated to all entangled observers.
conf 0.80
> Adam's interaction crossed both. And because his authority was federal — the collapse propagated instantaneously to all entangled observers.
Uncertainty: Causal chain relies on theological assumptions.

sections.title: evidence
sections.text:
Genesis records simultaneous awareness change after Adam ate, implying a single collapse event.
conf 0.70
> Then the eyes of both of them were opened.
Uncertainty: Interpretation of the verse as physical evidence is speculative.

sections.title: limitations
sections.text:
No equation currently relates Informational Fidelity values to collapse thresholds.
conf 0.90
> What we don't have is the equation that takes "this observer received the specification directly, this one received it degraded" and outputs "this measurement triggers collapse, this one doesn't." That equation doesn't exist yet.
Uncertainty: Acknowledged gap in formalism.
Whether the correspondences between Eden and superposition constitute true structural equivalence is unproven.
conf 0.85
> - Whether these correspondences constitute true structural equivalence remains unproven.
Uncertainty: Stated explicitly in audit section.

sections.title: implications
sections.text:
If the mapping holds across independent domains the universality claim gains credibility.
conf 0.80
> If the mapping holds in two independent domains, the universality claim becomes serious.
Uncertainty: Conditional implication dependent on future confirmation.
The authors suggest Eden represents a coherent state that current quantum mechanics only approximates.
conf 0.80
> Eden is not the quantum world we are trying to describe. Eden is the coherent state quantum mechanics is reaching toward and failing to formalize.
Uncertainty: Implication is theological and speculative.
